description: The stable 11-prompt subset selected after depth cycle 01 is frozen and run once on 24 fresh cases in four six-case packets.

strategies.name: Stable Eleven-Prompt Swarm
strategies.description: Eleven complementary general prompts selected from frequency across the top 100 balanced depth-cycle ensembles, followed only by deterministic plurality.

stages.instruction: Work carefully on this smaller case set. For each sequence, compare global structures, verify a late suffix when possible, and return the exact continuation supported by the strongest compact rule.
